title: Pop-up Emotes
description: Customize and display pop-up emotes above your character's head
body:
![asdasd](https://i.imgur.com/oiJ3HQ8.gif)

This mod allows you to customize and display pop-up emotes above your character's head

### Custom emotes
- Can be added by entering image URLs in the My Emotes screen, accessible through a button on the title screen
- Supported formats are .**png**, .**gif** and .jpeg.
- I recommend using [uploadimgur.com](https://uploadimgur.com/) for uploading images
- There are several selectable sounds for each emote

### Usage
- Open the emote menu by holding the **V** key
- Move the cursor to the desired emote and release the button
- To change pages, click either the right or left side of the screen

### Mods > Pop-up Emotes > Config
- Configure scale and brightness of emotes
- Set **personal** emote height. Helps when you play with custom player model mods like Yes Steve Model
- Access **player blacklist**
- If you are using a texture pack to replace default emotes that has fewer emotes than the default emount, you can hide what's left by specifying resourcePackEmoteAmount in the client config file

Also check out [Pop-up Emotes Online Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/pop-up-emotes-online-addon)

![Pie-menu showcase where a player chooses between emotes as they pop-up.](https://i.imgur.com/oEoZWAa.gif)
![emote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/57b3iSDf/images/a607651b814d59221f265f3bd30467e29e9e3458.png)
